dict.string: UjenziXform uses the camera to scan QR codes for deliveries and to add photos when you choose.
UjenziXform may access your photo library when you attach or upload images.
UjenziXform may save images you export to your photo library when you choose.
UjenziXform uses your location to set pickup and delivery points on the map and for delivery tracking.
UjenziXform uses your location for delivery and project site features when the app is in use.
UjenziXform may use the microphone if you record video or audio in a feature that requires it.
